title: The Fortune Shrine
description: A crude altar of welded scrap leans in the dust, ringed with offered coins and spent shell casings. A cracked dice cup sits at its center, daring you.

options.text: Leave a coin offering and walk on
options.result: You drop a coin in the dust and bow your head. Something in the gesture leaves you feeling the odds bend a little your way.

options.text: [Luck] Roll the cracked dice for the shrine's hoard
options.result_success: The dice come up blessed. The altar's false floor gives, spilling a Lucky Cog and a scatter of coin into your hands.
options.result_fail: Snake eyes. The scrap altar lurches and a hidden spike rakes your arm as you snatch your hand back empty.
